case_title: PURE WATER GROUP, LLC. VS. LIVING SUNLIGHT, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-02-2015 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JACK MARDEN AND MARK ZUCKERMAN--CORPORATE OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PURE WATER GROUP, LLC.

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT. THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE AGREEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES SET FORTH AT THE LAST CALLING OF THE CASE ON 10/8/15. AT THAT TIME, PLAINTIFF INFORMED THE COURT THAT THE CASE WAS GOING TO SETTLE BY 6/30/16, AND THAT DEFENDANT HAD AGREED UPON A PAYMENT PLAN WITH THE PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-02-2015 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PURE WATER GROUP, LLC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PURE WATER GROUP, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT LIVING SUNLIGHT, INC.
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF PURE WATER GROUP, LLC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PURE WATER GROUP, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIVING SUNLIGHT, INC. $3,332.80 PRINCIPAL, $480.32 INTEREST, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,878.12 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO DAVID SCHULHOP 931 OLD COUNTY ROAD, SUITE 3 BELMONT , CA. 94002

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-08-2015 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-30-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. ACCORDING TO PLAINTIFF WHO PHONED THE COURT ON 10/5/15 STATING THAT CASE IS GOING TO SETTLE BY THE NEXT HEARING DATE OF 6/30/16. DEFENDANT HAS MADE A PAYMENT PLAN WITH THE PLAINTIFF.
